recommendations.title: Amityville: The Evil Escapes
recommendations.overview: After moving into their matriarch's gothic seaside mansion, the Evans family soon becomes host to an uninvited demonic force in the form of a mysterious lamp that once resided in the Amityville house.

recommendations.title: Burnt Offerings
recommendations.overview: A family moves into a large old mansion in the countryside which seems to have a mysterious and sinister power over its new residents.

recommendations.title: Ghoulies
recommendations.overview: A young man and his girlfriend move into the man's old mansion home, where he becomes possessed by a need to control ancient demons.

recommendations.title: Me, Myself and Her
recommendations.overview: Two women -- a restaurateur and an architect -- have a seemingly idyllic romantic relationship, until the latter encounters a man she had a fling with.

recommendations.title: Wishmaster 4: The Prophecy Fulfilled
recommendations.overview: The unspeakable evil of the soul-devouring djinn rises again in this fourth electrifying installment of the unstoppable Wishmaster horror legacy! But now, as a host of new victims see their most nightmarish wishes come true, the world faces the ultim

recommendations.title: *batteries not included
recommendations.overview: In a soon to be demolished block of apartments, the residents resist the criminal methods used to force them to leave so a greedy tycoon can build his new skyscraper. When tiny mechanical aliens land for a recharge, they decide to stay and help out.

recommendations.title: Along Came the Devil
recommendations.overview: After a troubled childhood, Ashley searches for a connection, and unknowingly invites in a demonic force, which leaves her loved ones fighting for her soul.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: Piercing
recommendations.overview: After kissing his wife and baby goodbye for a seemingly normal business trip, Reed checks himself into a hotel room to accomplish something he’s always dreamed of: the perfect murder. As his sinister plans unfold, he soon realizes he might be in over

recommendations.title: The Valdemar Legacy
